items.name: Floating Aura Wave Sit

Perfect for vibing with friends, roleplay scenes, showcase moments, or simply standing out with a stylish emote. This animation blends float, wave, and sit movement into one seamless motion for a modern trending look.

Feel the vibe. Float in style. Express your aura.
